landing.badge: Muaki wo hetelela wa photifoliyo eka vatumbuluxi
landing.subtitle: Hinkwaswo leswi u swi lavaka ku kombisa vutshila bya wena, tiphurojeke na ntokoto wa wena.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Hi nyika switirhisiwa hinkwaswo leswi u swi lavaka ku hambana na ntshungu no land ntirho wa wena wa norho.
landing.feature1Desc: Hlela swiyenge swa wena hi ku olova, tiphurojeke, na vuswikoti hi muhleri ​​wa hina wa swivono wo twisiseka.
landing.feature2Desc: Hlawula eka tithempleyiti leti endliweke hi xiphurofexinali kutani u tiendlela ku languteka ka wena ko hlawuleka.
landing.feature3Desc: Landzelela vaendzi va wena, vona leswaku hi tihi tiphurojeke leti kumaka nyingiso lowukulu, ni swin’wana.

deleteAccount.title: Susa akhawunti hi laha ku nga heriki
deleteAccount.successMessage: Imeyili yo tiyisisa ku susiwa ka akhawunti yi rhumeriwile.
deleteAccount.errorMessage: Ku tsandzekile ku rhumela imeyili yo tiyisisa.
deleteAccount.confirmationMessage: Xana wa tiyiseka leswaku u lava ku susa akhawunti ya wena hilaha ku nga heriki?
deleteAccount.warningMessage1: U ta kuma email ku tiyisisa ku susiwa ka akhawunti.
deleteAccount.warningMessage2: Loko yi tiyisisiwile, datha hinkwayo (photifoliyo, tiphurojeke, tinhlayo) yi ta susiwa hi laha ku nga heriki naswona a yi nge vuyiseriwi.

toasts.toastSetup2FAFailed: Ku tsandzekile ku setup 2FA. Hi kombela u ringeta nakambe.
toasts.toast2FAEnabled: Ku tiyisisiwa ka swilo swimbirhi ku tirhisiwile.
toasts.toast2FADisabled: Ku tiyisisiwa ka swilo swimbirhi ku pfaleriwile.
toasts.toastSessionEnabled: Ku vekiwa tihlo ka seshini loku tirhaka ku tirhisiwile.
toasts.toastSessionDisabled: Ku vekiwa tihlo ka seshini loku tirhaka ku pfaleriwile.
toasts.toastSetupKeyCopied: Setup key yi kopiwile eka clipboard.

privacy.title: Pholisi ya Vuhlayiseki bya Swihundla
privacy.intro: Pholisi leyi ya Vuhlayiseki yi hlamusela ndlela leyi DevFolio yi hlengeletaka, yi tirhisaka, na ku sirhelela vuxokoxoko bya wena bya munhu hi xiyexe loko yi tirhisa vukorhokeri bya hina.
privacy.section1Content: Hi hlengeleta vuxokoxoko lebyi u byi nyikaka hi ku kongoma loko u endla akhawunti, u aka photifoliyo, na ku tihlanganisa na nseketelo wa hina.
privacy.section2Content: Rungula ra wena ri tirhisiwa ku tirha, ku hlayisa ni ku nyika swihlawulekisi swa vukorhokeri bya hina, swin’we ni ku vulavurisana na wena malunghana ni akhawunti ya wena kumbe vukorhokeri bya wena.
privacy.section3Content: Hi tirhisa magoza lama ringaneleke ya vuhlayiseki ku sirhelela rungula ra wena leswaku ri nga ngheni, ri paluxiwa kumbe ri nga onhiwi hi ndlela leyi nga pfumeleriwangiki.

confirmDeleteAccount.missingToken: Xikombiso xa xitiyisekiso a xi kumeki.
confirmDeleteAccount.defaultError: Ku tsandzekile ku susa akhawunti. Xikombiso xa kona xi nga ha va xi hundzile nkarhi.
confirmDeleteAccount.loadingMessage: Hi kombela mi yima, hi le ku endleni ka xikombelo xa n'wina.
confirmDeleteAccount.successTitle: Account Yi Susiwile Hi Ndlela Leyi Humelelaka
confirmDeleteAccount.successMessage: Data ya wena hinkwayo yi susiwile hi laha ku nga heriki. U ta kongomisiwa nakambe...

forgotPassword.otpSentToEmail: Khodi ya OTP yi rhumeriwile eka imeyili ya wena.
forgotPassword.emailThirdParty: Imeyili leyi yi tsarisiwile hi ku tirhisa munhu wa vunharhu.
forgotPassword.genericError: Ku ni xihoxo. Hi kombela u ringeta nakambe.
forgotPassword.otpVerified: Khodi ya OTP yi tiyisisiwile hi ndlela leyi humelelaka.
forgotPassword.otpExpired: Khodi ya OTP yi herile nkarhi. Hi kombela u kombela khodi leyintshwa.
forgotPassword.otpInvalid: Khodi ya OTP leyi nga tirhiki.
forgotPassword.otpResent: Khodi leyintshwa ya OTP yi rhumeriwile eka imeyili ya wena.
forgotPassword.otpResendFailed: Ku tsandzekile ku rhumela khodi ya OTP nakambe. Hi kombela u ringeta nakambe.
forgotPassword.passwordResetSuccess: Password hi ndlela leyi humelelaka reset. Hi kombela u nghena hi password ya wena leyintshwa.
forgotPassword.passwordResetFailed: Ku tsandzekile ku tlhela ku veka phaswedi.
forgotPassword.title: Rivele Phasiwedi
forgotPassword.description: Nghenisa adirese ya imeyili leyi tsarisiweke eka akhawunti ya wena. Hi ta rhumela khodi ya OTP ku tlhela hi veka phaswedi.
forgotPassword.verifyOtpDesc: Nghenisa khodi ya 6 wa tidijithali leyi rhumeriweke eka email ya wena ku tiyisisa vutitivisi bya wena.
forgotPassword.newPasswordDesc: Endla phaswedi leyintshwa, yo tiya ku sirhelela akhawunti ya wena.

verifyEmail.resendError: Ku tsandzekile ku rhumela nakambe imeyili ya ku tiyisisa. Hi kombela u ringeta nakambe.
verifyEmail.checkingStatus: Ku kambela xiyimo xa ku tiyisisa...
verifyEmail.title: Languta Email Ya Wena
verifyEmail.description: Hi rhumele email yo tiyisisa eka adirese ya wena ya email. Hi kombela u pfula imeyili ivi u tikhoma buti ya <1>"Tiyisisa akhawunti"</1> ku endla leswaku akhawunti ya wena yi tirha.
verifyEmail.step1: Pfula xitirhisiwa xa wena xa imeyili (Gmail, Yahoo, na swin'wana)
verifyEmail.step2: Languta email ku suka eka DevFolio leyi nga na nhlokomhaka leyi nge "Account Activation"
verifyEmail.step4: U ta kongomisiwa eka tluka ro nghena ku nghena
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Imeyili ya ku tiyisisa yi rhumeriwile nakambe!
verifyEmail.resendButton: Rhumela nakambe Imeyili ya ku Tiyisisa
verifyEmail.footerNote: Xana a wu yi amukelanga email? Languta folda ya <1>Spam</1> kumbe <2>Junk</2> eka imeyili ya wena. Xihlanganisi xa ku tiyisisa xi tirha ku ringana <3>24 wa tiawara</3>.
